## Summary

Expose **on-chain score attestation** via API and dapp UI: users sign a challenge, ZCore oracle publishes their current score/tier to the Soroban `score-registry`, and anyone can read it back.

---

## Implementation (completed)

### API endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/contracts/config` | Public | `{ enabled, contractId?, network?, rpcUrl? }` |
| GET | `/api/user/:wallet/on-chain` | Public | Read attested score from Soroban |
| POST | `/api/user/:wallet/attest` | Wallet signature | Publish score on-chain |

**Files:**
- `Server/src/controllers/contracts.controller.ts`
- `Server/src/services/soroban.service.ts`
- `Server/src/routes/contracts.routes.ts`, `user.routes.ts`

**Attest flow:**
1. User must exist in DB (registered)
2. Request body: `{ walletAddress, message, signature }` — same SEP-53 flow as #11
3. Server calls `set_score` via oracle keypair
4. Returns `{ txHash, score, tier }`

### Dapp UI

**Page:** `Front/app/dashboard/attestation/page.tsx`
- Shows contract config status
- Displays on-chain score if attested
- "Attest to chain" button → challenge → sign → POST attest
- Link to Stellar explorer for txHash

**API client:** `Front/lib/api-client.ts` — `getContractConfig`, `getOnChainScore`, `attestOnChain`

---

## How to verify

Requires #16 (contract deployed + env vars set).

```bash
# Config disabled without contract
curl https://zcore-api.vercel.app/api/contracts/config
# → { "enabled": false }

# After deploy + env:
curl https://zcore-api.vercel.app/api/user/G.../on-chain
```

Local: register user → attestation page → sign → confirm tx on explorer.

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Config endpoint reflects env state
- [x] Attest requires valid wallet signature
- [x] Read endpoint parses Soroban `get_score` response
- [x] Dapp attestation page implemented
- [ ] Works end-to-end on testnet (#16 blocker)

---

## Related

- #11 wallet signature verification
- #12 score-registry contract
- #16 deployment
- #25 on-chain events for indexers

---

## Error cases

| HTTP | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 401 | Invalid signature |
| 404 | User not found |
| 503 | `SCORE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ID` or `ORACLE_SECRET_KEY` not configured |
